HGSS.508.0000:
Welcome to the Pal Park!\f
This is where top-notch Trainers who
aren’t satisfied with the Safari Zone\r
come to show their Pokémon-catching\r
techniques to their peers.\f
...Oh?\f
Are you maybe...
Ah, you are [0103,0000,0000]!\f
My dad told me about you!
Word is, you’re a hotshot Trainer!\f
We’d be honored if you would
participate in our Catching Shows. [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0001:
Welcome to the Pal Park!\f
This is where top-notch Trainers who
aren’t satisfied with the Safari Zone\r
come to show their Pokémon-catching\r
techniques to their peers.\f
...Oh?\f
Are you maybe...
Ah, you are [0103,0000,0000]!\f
My dad told me about you!
Word is, you’re a hotshot Trainer!\f
We’d be honored if you would
participate in our Catching Shows. [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0002:
Yes! You agreed to participate!
Let’s not waste any time!\f
Let me explain how Pal Park works.
What should I explain? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0003:
Pal Park is a place where you are
timed on the catching of six Pokémon.\f
You are provided with six special
Poké Balls for the challenge.\f
Participating Trainers are required to
supply the six Pokémon that are to\r
be caught.\f
If you do not supply the stock of six
Pokémon, you may not participate in\r
the Catching Show.\f
...Would you like to know
anything else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0004:
At the start of the Catching Show,
you will be given six Park Balls.\f
Use the Park Balls to catch the
six Pokémon you provide.\f
...Would you like to know
anything else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0005:
Insert a Game Boy Advance Pokémon
Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald, FireRed,\r
or LeafGreen in the Game Pak slot.\f
Six of the currently caught Pokémon
can migrate from the Game Pak to the\r
DS Game Card when your DS is turned on\r
and you select “MIGRATE FROM...”\f
Please note that you cannot insert a
GBA Game Pak into a Nintendo DSi\r
to migrate.\f
...Would you like to know
anything else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0006:
Would you like to take part in
a Catching Show now? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0007:
Aww, that’s too bad.\f
Well, just give me a shout again
if you’d like to participate.
HGSS.508.0008:
Hi there, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Did you come to participate in
a Catching Show? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0009:
Hi there, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Did you come to participate in
a Catching Show? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0010:
OK, here are your Park Balls!\f
[0103,0000,0000] received
six Park Balls.\f
The current record holder is
[0103,0001,0000] with [0135,0002,0000] points.\f
OK, off you go, [0103,0000,0000].\f
Dazzle us with a masterful display
of Pokémon catching!\f
HGSS.508.0011:
OK, here are your Park Balls!\f
[0103,0000,0000] received
six Park Balls.\f
The current record holder is
[0103,0001,0000] with [0135,0002,0000] points.\f
OK, off you go, [0103,0000,0000].\f
Dazzle us with a masterful display
of Pokémon catching!\f
HGSS.508.0012:
Oh, hold on. You don’t have enough
Pokémon for a Catching Show.\f
You’ll need to stock us with six
Pokémon to participate.\f
You should make some Pokémon migrate
from Hoenn or another region!
HGSS.508.0013:
Yes! You agreed to participate!
Let’s not waste any time!\f
Let me explain how Pal Park works.
What should I explain? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0014:
I’m sorry you had to retire.
I’ll take what Park Balls you\r
have left.\f
Next time, please do stay to catch
all six Pokémon.
HGSS.508.0015:
Oh, your PC Boxes are filled. You
have no room for six more Pokémon.\f
You won’t be able to accept them,
even if you do catch them.\f
Make enough room in a PC Box and
come back for your Catching Show.
HGSS.508.0016:
Congratulations!
That’s all six Pokémon caught!\f
The audience sure enjoyed watching
your Catching Show.\f
All right, let’s see your all-important
score from this show!\f
...
...\f
Catching Points: [0135,0000,0000]!\f
Time Points: [0135,0001,0000]!\f
Type Points: [0135,0002,0000]!\f
The total is...\f
...
...\f
[0135,0003,0000] points!\f
HGSS.508.0017:
Wow! That’s an outstanding record!
Kudos to you!\f
HGSS.508.0018:
Good! That’s a decent record.
Props to you!\f
HGSS.508.0019:
Would you like to put all caught
Pokémon in PC Boxes? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0020:
Done!
Your Pokémon have been boxed away.\f
You’ll now have to save the game.\f
HGSS.508.0021:
Oh, then it might be fun for you to
go for an even better score by\r
trying to catch these six again.\f
If you want to do another Catching
Show, just come see us!
HGSS.508.0022:
If you want to do another Catching
Show, come see us again, please!\f
HGSS.508.0023:
It’s time for your prize!
Here you are!\f
HGSS.508.0024:
Do another Catching Show
with the same Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.508.0025:
The current record holder is
[0103,0001,0000] with [0135,0002,0000] points.\r
Can you top that?
HGSS.508.0026:
Oh! You’ve topped 2,000 points!
You’ve earned this, then!\f
HGSS.508.0027:
Keep working on getting a higher
score!
HGSS.508.0028:
Oh! You’ve topped 2,500 points!
You’ve earned this, then!\f
HGSS.508.0029:
Oh! You’ve topped 3,000 points!
You’ve earned this, then!\f
HGSS.508.0030:
Oh! You’ve earned 3,500 points!
You’ve earned this, then!\f
HGSS.508.0031:
You’ve set an incredible record!
There’s nothing left to say!
HGSS.508.0032:
Your Bag is full.
You should come back later.
HGSS.508.0033:
I’ve heard Trainers complain that
rare Pokémon take longer to appear.\f
Is it easier to start with common
Pokémon?
HGSS.508.0034:
Oh, me?
No, I never catch Pokémon myself.\r
But I enjoy Catching Shows a lot.\f
I love to see Johto and Hoenn Pokémon,
especially.\f
The regions I’ve never been to
are so mysterious.
HGSS.508.0035:
I feel so happy that I’d like to share
my happiness with you today.\f
I must crown you with this...
Crown.\f
Oh, before you get the wrong idea,
it’s an Accessory for Pokémon.\f
HGSS.508.0036:
I feel so happy that I’d like to share
my happiness with you today.\f
I feel compelled to give you this
Tiara.\f
Oh, before you get the wrong idea,
it’s an Accessory for Pokémon.\f
HGSS.508.0037:
I feel so happy that I’d like to share
my happiness with you today.\f
I wish you would take this
“Seafloor” Backdrop.\f
Please try using it when dressing up
your Pokémon with Accessories.\f
HGSS.508.0038:
I feel so happy that I’d like to share
my happiness with you today.\f
I wish you would take this
“Underground” Backdrop.\f
Please try using it when dressing up
your Pokémon with Accessories.\f
HGSS.508.0039:
I feel so happy that I’d like to share
my happiness with you today.\f
I wish you would take this
“Sky” Backdrop.\f
Please try using it when dressing up
your Pokémon with Accessories.\f
HGSS.508.0040:
Not only is there the Pokéathlon and
the Safari Zone, but also the\r
Battle Frontier and the Pal Park...\f
People other than me are working
so hard... How dreamy...\r
This region sets my heart aflutter.
HGSS.508.0041:
I came to see [0103,0000,0000]’s
Catching Show...\f
Wow, [0103,0000,0000]! Are you for real?
HGSS.508.0042:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Your Catching Show was awesome!\r
I’ll become a Trainer like you!
HGSS.508.0044:
My son is a big fan of yours,
[0103,0000,0000].\r
Are you...that famous?
HGSS.508.0045:
If you want to see rare Pokémon,
Catching Shows at the Pal Park are\r
the best!
